title: Internal Error: ../V3LinkDot.cpp:3791: ClassRef has unlinked class

features.name: virtual class with type parameter containing member of parameter type
features.description: Code should include a virtual class with a type parameter that has a member variable of that parameter type
features.snippet: virtual class uvm_sequence #(type REQ = int); REQ req; endclass

features.name: multi-level class inheritance with type parameter specialization
features.description: Code should include a class extending a parameterized virtual class with a concrete type, then further extended through multiple inheritance levels
features.snippet:
class trgt_base_sequence extends uvm_sequence#(s_trgt_txn); endclass
class trgt_base_port_seq extends trgt_base_sequence; endclass

features.name: randomize with local scope resolution in class method
features.description: Code should include a class with a rand member variable that calls randomize() with a constraint using local:: to reference another class member variable
features.snippet: rand bit wr_flag; virtual task body(); if (!req.randomize() with { local::wr_flag; }) begin end endtask
